description_long: This is a hand drum, specifically a djembe, featuring a goblet-shaped wooden body with a taut, circular drumhead made of animal skin or synthetic material. The drum's body is painted in a vibrant reddish-brown hue, adorned with intricate blue and white dot patterns and stylized animal motifs, likely inspired by African art. Black rope tensioning runs vertically and diagonally around the drum, securing the drumhead and adding a decorative element. The base of the drum is slightly flared and covered in blue with white and black painted designs, providing visual contrast to the upper section. The drumhead is smooth and off-white, with visible rope lacing around its edge. This instrument is compact and portable, suitable for street performances, parks, or community gatherings in urban environments.
description: A compact, hand-played djembe drum with a reddish-brown wooden body, blue and white painted motifs, and a taut off-white drumhead secured by black rope.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the smooth, off-white drumhead and the black rope lacing around its edge.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the reddish-brown body, black rope tensioning, and blue painted base with white motifs.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the blue base with a prominent black and white animal motif and the vertical rope pattern.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the painted designs on the base and the overall goblet shape of the drum.
